clusters.summary: Pending native acceptance and weak manual proof no longer widen into booked calmness without corroboration or authoritative confirmation.
notes: Pending native gate assurance is now weak by default for pending responses.
Hard-match refs are no longer auto-populated for non-authoritative native responses.
The browser proof now requires truthProjection-driven labels before it will pass.

clusters.summary: Alternative-offer mutation fences now evaluate expiry against the command recordedAt rather than wall-clock time, eliminating nondeterministic fallback closure drift.
notes: Recorded-at evaluation keeps fallback law deterministic across seeded scenarios.
Callback linkage debt remains explicit until a durable link is recorded.
The recovery browser proof now replays consistently on the desktop exceptions route.
